subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Truth! The morn of reality hath broken, and the light of divine knowledge hath shone forth, and the signs of God are luminous like the morning light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق حق صبح حقیقت آچلدی و نور معرفت پارلادی و آثار حق نور سحر گبی
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
